testcase.name: test_brute_force_lockout
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auth_phase1.py:155: in test_brute_force_lockout assert last_status == 429, f"Expected 429 lockout, got {last_status}" E AssertionError: Expected 429 lockout, got 401 E assert 401 == 429

testcase.name: test_cors_credentials

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected explicit origin, got '*' assert '*' == 'https://recr...gentagent.com'
- https://recruiter-dash-10.preview.emergentagent.com + *

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auth_phase1.py:175: in test_cors_credentials assert acao == FRONTEND_URL, f"Expected explicit origin, got '{acao}'" E AssertionError: Expected explicit origin, got '*' E assert '*' == 'https://recr...gentagent.com' E E - https://recruiter-dash-10.preview.emergentagent.com E + *

testcase.name: test_admin_creates_user_member_cannot

error.message: failed on setup with "AssertionError: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_auth_phase1.py:54: in member_session assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_patch_role_and_delete
testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:1116: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: in raw_decode raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_auth_phase1.py:242: in test_admin_patch_role_and_delete uid = r.json()["id"] ^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:1120: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)

testcase.name: test_delete_user_unassigns_prospects
testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:1116: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: in raw_decode raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_auth_phase1.py:266: in test_delete_user_unassigns_prospects owner_id = r.json()["id"] ^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:1120: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
